title: Nami Breaks Down
description: On pages 9–12, nami breaks down focuses on Nami, Arlong, Marine Captain Nezumi, Nojiko as nami’s stolen savings and Arlong’s betrayal push Cocoyashi Village into open rebellion, forcing her to ask Luffy for help.
scene: On pages 9–12, nami breaks down focuses on Nami, Arlong, Marine Captain Nezumi, Nojiko as nami’s stolen savings and Arlong’s betrayal push Cocoyashi Village into open rebellion, forcing her to ask Luffy for help.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't want to see them hurt any one of you again!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Now move out of our way, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Even if we may not win, let's show them our spirit!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You don't even know the first thing about anything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This has nothing to do with you...!

summary: This part turns Nami’s private suffering into an open crisis, ending with the emotional choice to rely on Luffy.
